release_notes:
🚀 What's New in v1.4:

✅ Dual Mode Printing: Now print Passbook Front Page and ID Cards in two different professional modes.
✅ Smart Statement Print: Automatically prints the statement starting exactly from the last printed line.
✅ New Interactive Widget: Added a new widget on the dashboard for better accessibility and quick controls.
✅ Auto-Renewal System: Instantly renew your subscription via secure QR code popup directly from the app.
✅ Smart PDF Export: Customer reports now accurately save directly to your custom assigned folders.
✅ Clean Print Preview: Removed all hardcoded dummy data for a 100% professional live preview.

Thank you for choosing Print Pilot by Digital Mitra!
